element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns fundamental team control mechanics with one controllable player and AI teammates
Repeated tackles can knock out opposing players, removing them for the rest of the half

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Tournament Mode - Early to mid progression
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Each team has unique super shots available up to five times per half; triggered by bicycle kicks, diving headers, or charged walks

element_introduction_order.first_appears: VS Match Mode or later tournament matches
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Different field materials significantly impact player movement and ball physics; requires tactical adjustment

element_introduction_order.element: Multiple team selection and distinct playstyles
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Thirteen national teams with different super shot types and implicit playstyle variations

typical_tension_triggers: Player on team knocked out (reduced to 5 players)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Match-based pacing with natural rhythm governed by soccer rules; tension builds toward goal-scoring opportunities; relief comes from successful plays and opponent elimination through knockouts

difficulty_curve.early_game: Initial tournament matches against basic AI opponents; introduction to team mechanics and standard play
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progressive difficulty as tournament advances; opposing teams employ more aggressive tactics and coordinated play
difficulty_curve.late_game: Final matches against strongest national teams; requires mastery of super shot timing, player knockouts, and field adaptation
notable_spikes: Ice field matches where player momentum and control significantly reduced
Matches requiring super shot management under pressure

notable_level_patterns.description: Linear tournament structure where player advances through matches against increasingly difficult national teams; each match is independent 90-minute game
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Tournament Mode - USA vs Japan (likely early match) through final

notable_level_patterns.description: Different playing fields (sand, ice, dirt) introduce environmental gameplay modifiers that alter ball and player physics; ice is most challenging
notable_level_patterns.example_level: VS Match Mode across three field types; tournament may feature varied field surfaces

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of 13 national teams has distinct super shot mechanics, creating varied tactical gameplay and encouraging multiple playthroughs
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Any tournament match; super shot differentiation evident across all 13 teams
